rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
conflict: The resource has already been modified.
tagAlreadyExists: A tag with that name already exists.
folderAlreadyExists: A folder with that name already exists.
folderCircularReference: Cannot move a folder into its own descendant.
folderNotFound: The specified folder was not found.
notInTrash: Item is not in the trash.
attachmentMigrationIncomplete: Legacy attachments still exist; please migrate first
legacyIntegrityMismatch: Attachment content has changed; please retry
attachmentInconsistentVersion: Attachment is in an inconsistent state
invalidEncryptionFormat: The encryption format of the uploaded data is invalid.
alreadyAMember: Already a member of this organization.
invitationAlreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
invitationWrongEmail: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
invitationAlreadySent: An invitation has already been sent to this address.
ownerOnly: Only the owner can perform this action.
cannotChangeHigherRole: Cannot change the role of a member at or above your level.
cannotRemoveHigherRole: Cannot remove a member at or above your level.
keyNotDistributed: Encryption key has not been distributed yet. Please wait for an administrator.
keyAlreadyDistributed: Encryption key has already been distributed to this member.
vaultNotReady: Member's vault is not set up yet.
teamKeyVersionMismatch: Encryption key version is outdated. Please refresh and try again.
entryCountMismatch: The number of submitted entries does not match the total. Please refresh and try again.
onlyOwnEntries: You can only modify your own entries.
invalidDateRange: The expiry date must be after the issue date.
selfLockout: Your current IP would be blocked by this policy.
pinLengthPolicyNotSatisfied: Security key PIN length does not meet tenant policy requirements.
policySharingDisabled: Sharing is disabled by team policy.
policyExportDisabled: Export is disabled by team policy.
verifierNotSet: Please lock and unlock your vault first.
accountLocked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
serviceUnavailable: Temporary server error. Please try again.
unknownError: An error occurred. Please try again.
extensionTokenRevoked: Client app token has been revoked.
extensionTokenSessionExpired: Client app token lifetime exceeded. Please re-authorize the app.
extensionTokenScopeInsufficient: Client app token does not have the required scope.
invalidChallenge: Security key registration could not be completed. Please retry.
auditChainSeedNotFound: The starting point for partial audit-chain verification was not found. Specify a different starting sequence number.
mobileRefreshReuseDetected: Refresh token reuse detected. Please sign in again on the mobile device.
mobileRefreshSessionExpired: Mobile session expired. Please sign in again.
emergencyRecoveryKeyMissing: Emergency recovery key has not been provided yet. Please wait for the vault owner.
grantRevoked: This emergency access grant has been revoked.
recoveryKeyNotSet: No Recovery Key has been set up.
vaultResetTokenExpired: This vault reset link has expired.
vaultResetTokenUsed: This vault reset link has already been used.
vaultResetNotApproved: Reset has not been approved yet.
resetNotApprovable: Reset cannot be approved at this time.
resetTargetEmailChanged: Target user's email has changed since the reset was initiated.
forbiddenInsufficientRole: Your role is insufficient to approve this reset. A higher-level administrator must approve it.
scimOwnerProtected: Cannot modify the organization owner via SCIM.
scimManagedMember: This member is managed by SCIM. Please re-activate from your identity provider.
scimTokenLimitExceeded: Maximum number of SCIM tokens reached. Please revoke unused tokens first.
apiKeyLimitExceeded: Maximum number of API keys reached. Please revoke unused keys first.
apiKeyAlreadyRevoked: API key has already been revoked.
apiKeyScopeInsufficient: API key does not have the required scope.
itemKeyRequired: This entry requires ItemKey encryption. Please update the entry first.
keyVersionWithoutReencrypt: Cannot update encryption settings without re-encrypting the entry.
sharePasswordRequired: A password is required to access this content.
shareGone: This shared link is no longer available.
policySharePasswordRequired: Team policy requires a password for shared links.
saLimitExceeded: Maximum number of service accounts reached.
saNameConflict: A service account with this name already exists.
saInvalidScope: The selected scopes are invalid for this service account.
saTokenLimitExceeded: Maximum number of tokens per service account reached.
saTokenAlreadyRevoked: Service account token has already been revoked.
operatorTokenLimitExceeded: Maximum number of operator tokens per tenant reached. Please revoke unused tokens first.
operatorTokenStaleSession: Re-authenticate within the last 15 minutes to continue this action, then try again.
sessionStepUpRequired: Re-authenticate within the last 15 minutes to continue this action, then try again.
mcpClientNameConflict: An MCP client with this name already exists.
mcpClientLimitExceeded: Maximum number of MCP clients per tenant reached.
mcpTokenNotFound: MCP token not found or expired.
mcpTokenScopeInsufficient: MCP token does not have the required scope.
delegationEntriesNotFound: Some entries not found or not accessible.
authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please try signing in again.
syncFailed: Directory sync failed. Please check the logs and retry.
keyVersionNotNewer: The entry has already been updated to a newer key version. Please refresh and try again.
blobHashMismatch: The entry has changed since this history version was created. Please refresh and try again.
